title: Cobblemon: Team Rocket
body:
# **Save Team Rocket's Pokémon**
### Adds "Shadow Pokemon" powered up by Team Rocket to Cobblemon.
"Shadow Pokémon" from Pokémon GO
![Shadow Charizard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a084d02f5425ebd79a3744c55274cec96a5cf0d.png)

# **Features**
・Shadow Pokémon have higher attack power. In exchange, their defense is lower.

・If you give a "Shiny Stone" to a Shadow Pokemon, you can free it from the power of evil.

# **Current Mod Contents**
Including Charmander line
Including Bulbasaur(WIP)



# **Note**
Shadow Pokémon are currently not available through normal means, so you'll need to create a spawn file or create an alternative way to obtain them.
